transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-09]
[00:00] You: Sales pipeline review. Let's work through the top 10 opportunities.
[00:35] Speaker 1: Acme Corp is at proposal stage. I'll send them the revised pricing deck by July 11th. They've asked about an enterprise pilot — I'll also put together a pilot scope document by July 14th.
[01:30] Speaker 2: Globex is at contract review. Their legal team wants redlines back by July 12th. I'll handle those today.
[02:00] You: Good. Initech — where are we?
[02:15] Speaker 3: Initech stalled after the demo. I'll set up a follow-up call with their CTO for next week. I'll send the calendar invite today.
[02:50] Speaker 1: I should also loop in our solutions engineer for the Initech follow-up. Speaker 4, can you join that call?
[03:05] Speaker 4: Yes. I'll also prepare a custom technical deep-dive deck for Initech by July 14th.
[03:35] You: What about Vandelay Industries?
[03:50] Speaker 2: Vandelay is a new inbound from last week. I'll qualify them with a discovery call this week — I'll book it today.
[04:20] Speaker 3: There's also a renewal coming up — Umbrella Corp's contract expires July 31st. I'll reach out to their account manager by July 12th to start renewal discussions.
[04:55] You: Good. Speaker 1, can you update the CRM with all these opportunity stages?
[05:10] Speaker 1: I'll update all opportunity stages in Salesforce by end of day today.
[05:35] You: And let's make sure our Q3 forecast is updated. Speaker 2, can you own that?
[05:50] Speaker 2: I'll update the Q3 sales forecast in the board deck by July 16th.
[06:10] Speaker 4: I should also note that we need product feedback on the demo environment — some flows are broken. I'll file a bug report with the product team today.

action_items.description: Send Acme Corp revised pricing deck
action_items.source_quote: I'll send them the revised pricing deck by July 11th.

action_items.source_quote: I'll also prepare a custom technical deep-dive deck for Initech by July 14th.

decisions: Umbrella Corp renewal discussions should begin before contract expiry on July 31st
